title: Add Vector AI Agent to bots
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Shortcuts to the hive
gist.blurb: Mincoffical and Elc29 just dropped Vector AI Agent into the greenhouse. It's a free Apple Shortcut that juggles multitasking AI requests across multiple Pollinations models right from your device.
gist.summary: Added the Vector AI Agent, a free Apple Shortcut built by community members Mincoffical and Elc29, to the community app showcase.
gist.impact: iOS and Mac users can now easily run multitasking AI requests across multiple models directly from their devices using a native shortcut.
gist.visual_concept: The PR adds an Apple Shortcut bot called 'Vector AI Agent'. Visual symbols: a glowing smartphone or shortcut blocks, a robot representing the agent, and Polly the bee. Scene: Polly and the Monitor Robot marveling at a glowing smartphone running shortcut blocks in a cozy digital garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee and a cute chunky robot with a CRT monitor head looking at a glowing smartphone displaying colorful stacked shortcut blocks. They are sitting in a lush digital garden with code-plants sprouting from lime green (#ecf874) flower pots. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites, nostalgic but beautiful.
